ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sequencer will still reconnect the sequence when using this command.
ast.target: 使用此命令时，序列器仍会重新连接序列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically creates the corresponding link back to your current note, when adding a sequential link to another note.
ast.target: 在向另一个笔记添加顺序链接时，自动创建指向当前笔记的对应反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only suggest notes in the same folder when adding sequential links.
ast.target: 添加顺序链接时，仅建议同一文件夹中的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a note in a sequence is deleted, reconnect the previous and next notes automatically.
ast.target: 当序列中的某个笔记被删除时，自动重新连接前一个和后一个笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ask before the sequencer delete command removes a note and reconnects the sequence.
ast.target: 在序列器删除命令移除笔记并重新连接序列前进行确认。
